memory:memory/2026-04-03.md:37:58.snippet: - **Next step:** Try int4/int8 quantization for qualifier + target, OR use MLX backend (more memory efficient on Apple Silicon) ### MLX Breakthrough (05:20-06:16 EDT) - Switched to MLX backend — all 3 models load at **5.56 GB** peak (vs OOM with PyTorch) - Models: Qwen2.5-0.5B/1.5B/7B-Instruct-4bit via mlx-community - 2-model spec dec works via mlx-lm built-in: 67.6 tok/s (3B), 25 tok/s (7B) - 3-model PyramidSD loop runs but **KV cache desync bug** — rejected draft tokens advance the draft cache but not qualifier/target caches - Result: 2.4% draft acceptance, garbage output - Fix needed: proper cache trim/rollback on rejection - Pushed to GitHub: `e33467f` on v2-token-level branch - README
